entries.statement: Skill in producing enterprise data architecture artifacts, including data flow diagrams, entity-relationship models, data domain maps, and integration architecture documentation.
Skill in evaluating data platform technology options against requirements, including performance, scalability, cost, security, and operational complexity trade-offs.
Skill in defining and enforcing enterprise data modeling standards, naming conventions, and structural patterns across engineering teams.
Skill in designing ML training and serving infrastructure that scales from prototype to production without requiring architectural rework.

Skill in designing and implementing data pipeline monitoring and observability systems, including lineage tracking, data freshness alerting, volume anomaly detection, schema drift detection, execution monitoring, cost attribution, and root-cause analysis tooling for pipeline failures and data quality incidents.
Skill in performance tuning data pipelines, including query optimization, partition strategy, caching, and resource scaling.
Skill in deploying, configuring, and scaling data platform components using infrastructure-as-code with version control and automated testing.
Skill in implementing data platform cost management practices, including resource tagging, usage monitoring, cost allocation, and rightsizing recommendations.

Skill in designing and implementing automated data pipeline testing, including unit tests for transformations, integration tests for end-to-end data flows, and regression testing for schema and data quality changes.

Skill in implementing data integration across heterogeneous source systems, including API-based extraction, change data capture configuration, streaming ingestion, and the resolution of schema conflicts between sources.
Skill in performing root cause analysis for data infrastructure failures, including diagnosis of pipeline breakdowns, data corruption events, performance degradation, and systemic reliability issues.

Skill in managing schema evolution across data systems, including backward and forward compatibility enforcement, schema registry operation, migration scripting, and coordinating schema changes across producer and consumer systems.

Skill in database performance tuning and optimization, including query plan analysis, index strategy design, storage optimization, and workload management for both relational and non-relational database systems.

Skill in data platform capacity planning and scaling, including workload forecasting, resource utilization analysis, auto-scaling configuration, and proactive scaling decisions that prevent service degradation.
Skill in implementing and operating data catalog and metadata management systems, including automated metadata harvesting, business glossary curation, data asset discovery, and lineage visualization.
Skill in planning and executing data migration projects, including source-to-target mapping, data validation strategies, cutover planning, rollback procedures, and post-migration verification.

Skill in implementing data backup and disaster recovery procedures, including backup automation, recovery testing, failover configuration, and validation that recovery objectives are achievable under realistic conditions.

Skill in designing and implementing data API and service layers, including RESTful and GraphQL endpoint design, authentication and authorization integration, rate limiting, and API versioning strategies.

Skill in communicating data architecture decisions and technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders, including translating infrastructure constraints into business impact language and producing architecture decision records.
Skill in assessing data quality, including evaluating data source quality, conducting data validation, and establishing data quality metrics and thresholds for data systems.
Skill in analyzing system performance issues, including identifying performance bottlenecks, analyzing performance trends, and troubleshooting performance degradation in data systems.

Skill in investigating incidents and assessing risks in data systems, including performing incident analysis, correlating failure events, and conducting risk assessments of system failures and data issues.

Skill in designing data aggregation and fusion architectures, including combining data from multiple sources, performing data fusion operations, and consolidating datasets while maintaining data integrity.

Skill in designing data visualization and reporting infrastructure, including creating data pipelines for business intelligence tools, designing accessible data visualizations, and implementing self-service reporting systems.
Skill in designing and managing test data infrastructure, including managing test datasets, generating synthetic test data, maintaining test environments, and coordinating test asset lifecycle.

Skill in designing data pipeline architecture for ETL and ELT workflows, including defining transformation logic, orchestrating data flows, managing pipeline dependencies, and implementing error handling strategies.

Skill in designing and deploying continuous monitoring and alerting systems for data pipelines, including setting up alert thresholds, automating monitoring tasks, integrating with notification systems, and maintaining observability.
Skill in designing data transformation and processing workflows, including data normalization, data preprocessing, feature engineering, and implementing transformation pipelines.

Skill in developing enterprise data architecture strategy, including aligning data infrastructure with organizational objectives, planning technology roadmaps, and making strategic decisions on data platforms and tools.

Skill in designing and implementing data lineage tracking and impact analysis systems, including mapping data flows across systems, tracking data provenance, and assessing the impact of schema and data changes on downstream consumers.
